name: acm
description: Associative Context Memory (ACM) — an MCP server that captures implicit feedback signals and builds cross-session experience memory for Claude Code.

ollama_url.title: Ollama API URL
ollama_url.description: Ollama API URL for corrective instruction classification (default: http://localhost:11434)

ollama_model.title: Ollama Model
ollama_model.description: Ollama model name for corrective classification (default: gemma2:2b)

verbosity.title: Verbosity Level
verbosity.description: ACM output detail level: quiet, normal, or verbose (default: normal)

max_experiences_per_project.title: Max Experiences Per Project
max_experiences_per_project.description: Maximum experience entries per project before GC triggers (default: 500)

inject_corrective_bodies_score_threshold.title: Corrective Body Inline Score Threshold
inject_corrective_bodies_score_threshold.description: Minimum retrieval score for inlining raw corrective instruction bodies into the FAILURE entry in session injection (default: 0.6; valid range 0.0–5.0 since the score includes retrieval boost and can exceed 1.0). Lower values surface more instructions; higher values restrict to top-ranked entries.

inject_corrective_bodies_max.title: Max Inlined Bodies Per Entry
inject_corrective_bodies_max.description: Maximum number of raw corrective instructions shown inline under each FAILURE entry (default: 3).
